description_long: This object is a short sword with a straight, double-edged blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade is metallic and has a uniform, matte gray finish, with no visible engravings or decorative elements. The crossguard is simple and angular, extending horizontally from the base of the blade to provide hand protection. The handle is cylindrical and appears to be made of a darker material, possibly metal or a synthetic composite, and ends in a rounded pommel. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible ornamentation or embellishments. The proportions and construction suggest it is designed for practical use rather than display.
description: A short, straight-bladed sword with a simple crossguard and a cylindrical handle, all in matte gray tones. The design is functional and unadorned.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight blade, angular crossguard, and cylindrical handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and the handle, with minimal width visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and handle.
